svg.title: Zere AI chatbot architecture
svg.desc: Architecture diagram showing the flow from browser through Next.js, Express WebSocket, FastAPI search, and Groq LLM

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the user connect to Zere AI?')
sendPrompt('What does the Next.js frontend do in Zere AI?')
sendPrompt('What does Express WebSocket service do in Zere AI?')
sendPrompt('How does the FastAPI semantic search work?')
sendPrompt('What is the Groq LLM used in Zere AI?')
sendPrompt('What data does Supabase store in Zere AI?')
